places.name: Gardaland
places.description: Italy's largest theme park — roller coasters, water rides, SEA LIFE aquarium. Full day; arrive at opening.

places.name: CanevaWorld Aqua Paradise
places.description: Water park with extreme slides and pools — ideal hot-day alternative to Gardaland.

places.name: Movieland Park
places.description: Movie-themed rides and stunt shows — same resort area as CanevaWorld.

places.name: Jungle Adventure Park
places.description: Tree-top ropes and zip lines near Gardaland — good half-day add-on.

places.name: Rimbalzello Adventure Park
places.description: Lake-view adventure park — Tibetan bridges, zip lines, treetop courses.

places.name: Monte Baldo Cable Car
places.description: Rotating cable car from Malcesine — panoramic views; gateway to hiking and paragliding.

places.name: Paragliding Tandem (Monte Baldo)
places.description: Tandem flights from Monte Baldo — book ahead; minimum age typically 16 with guardian.

places.name: Malcesine
places.description: Scaliger castle old town — combine with Monte Baldo cable car or lake ferry.

places.name: Riva del Garda — SUP & Water Sports
places.description: SUP, kayak, wakeboard rentals — active lake day at the north shore.

places.name: Torbole — Windsurfing & Sailing
places.description: Wind capital of Lake Garda — lessons and rentals for windsurf and sailing.

places.name: Desenzano — Self-Drive Boat Rental
places.description: Rent a small boat (no license, up to 40 HP) — more engaging than a guided tour.

places.name: Natura Viva Safari Park
places.description: Safari park and zoo near Verona — strong appeal for teens; ~45 min from Monzambano.

places.name: Vittoriale degli Italiani
places.description: Eccentric poet's estate with a warship in the garden — quirky hit with older teens.

places.name: Verona Arena
places.description: 1st-century Roman amphitheater — scheduled Jun 28 day trip.

places.name: Sirmione — Scaligero Castle
places.description: Medieval castle on the peninsula — keep visit short if teens prefer the spa.

places.name: Aquaria Thermal Spa
places.description: Lakeside thermal pools — group booking Jun 29; book in advance.

places.name: Borghetto sul Mincio
places.description: Medieval watermill village — riverside walk ~1 hr. Jul 2 nature day.

places.name: Parco Giardino Sigurtà
places.description: Flat garden paths and flowers — gentle ~2 hr nature walk.

places.name: Serravalle Designer Outlet
places.description: Designer outlet shopping ~3 hrs — Jul 3 en route to Milan.

places.name: Trattoria del Ponte
places.description: Welcome dinner — lake fish and local pasta in Monzambano.

places.name: Ristorante Pace
places.description: Desenzano waterfront — fresh lake fish and risotto.

places.name: Trattoria Al Pompiere
places.description: Classic Verona grill — pollo alla griglia.

places.name: Locanda al Bersagliere
places.description: Sirmione castle area — lake-view lunch.

places.name: Taverna del Silenzio
places.description: Famous Tortellini di Valeggio — book ahead in Borghetto.

places.name: Ristorante Vecchia Malcesine
places.description: Pre-cable-car lunch in Malcesine old town.

places.name: Trattoria del Nuovo Macello
places.description: Milan farewell steak dinner. Alternative: Spontini pizza.
